---
title: "CPS Statistical Significance"
subtitle: "Changes in unemployment rates for select groups with statistical significance"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-title: "Variables"
    theme: cosmo
    embed-resources: true
---

```{=html}
<style>
.chart-nopandemic { display: none; }
.toggle-banner {
  background: #f0f4f8;
  border-left: 4px solid steelblue;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  border-radius: 4px;
}
</style>
```

The shaded band around zero shows the range of changes that are **not statistically significant at the 90% level**.  A break in the line indicates missing data (October 2025).

THESE ARE SLIGHTLY DIFFERENT THAN THE ST LOUIS FED ONES because I am not rounding to the nearest tenth of a percent.

---

```{=html}
<div class="toggle-banner">
  <label style="cursor:pointer; font-weight:500;">
    <input type="checkbox" id="pandToggle" style="margin-right:6px;">
    Hide pandemic years (Mar 2020–Apr 2021)
  </label>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  document.getElementById('pandToggle').addEventListener('change', function() {
    var hide = this.checked;
    document.querySelectorAll('.chart-full').forEach(function(el) {
      el.style.display = hide ? 'none' : 'block';
    });
    document.querySelectorAll('.chart-nopandemic').forEach(function(el) {
      el.style.display = hide ? 'block' : 'none';
    });
  });
});
</script>
```

## Unemployment Rate, 16+

::: {.panel-tabset}
### 1-Month Change
::: {.chart-full}
![](output/ur_total16_m1.png){width=100%}
:::
::: {.chart-nopandemic}
![](output/ur_total16_m1_nopandemic.png){width=100%}
:::

### 3-Month Change
::: {.chart-full}
![](output/ur_total16_m3.png){width=100%}
:::
::: {.chart-nopandemic}
![](output/ur_total16_m3_nopandemic.png){width=100%}
:::

### 6-Month Change
::: {.chart-full}
![](output/ur_total16_m6.png){width=100%}
:::
::: {.chart-nopandemic}
![](output/ur_total16_m6_nopandemic.png){width=100%}
:::

### 12-Month Change
::: {.chart-full}
![](output/ur_total16_m12.png){width=100%}
:::
::: {.chart-nopandemic}
![](output/ur_total16_m12_nopandemic.png){width=100%}
:::
:::

## Unemployment Rate, Black Workers

::: {.panel-tabset}
### 1-Month Change
::: {.chart-full}
![](output/ur_black_m1.png){width=100%}
:::
::: {.chart-nopandemic}
![](output/ur_black_m1_nopandemic.png){width=100%}
:::

### 3-Month Change
::: {.chart-full}
![](output/ur_black_m3.png){width=100%}
:::
::: {.chart-nopandemic}
![](output/ur_black_m3_nopandemic.png){width=100%}
:::

### 6-Month Change
::: {.chart-full}
![](output/ur_black_m6.png){width=100%}
:::
::: {.chart-nopandemic}
![](output/ur_black_m6_nopandemic.png){width=100%}
:::

### 12-Month Change
::: {.chart-full}
![](output/ur_black_m12.png){width=100%}
:::
::: {.chart-nopandemic}
![](output/ur_black_m12_nopandemic.png){width=100%}
:::
:::

## Unemployment Rate, Asian Workers

::: {.panel-tabset}
### 1-Month Change
::: {.chart-full}
![](output/ur_asian_m1.png){width=100%}
:::
::: {.chart-nopandemic}
![](output/ur_asian_m1_nopandemic.png){width=100%}
:::

### 3-Month Change
::: {.chart-full}
![](output/ur_asian_m3.png){width=100%}
:::
::: {.chart-nopandemic}
![](output/ur_asian_m3_nopandemic.png){width=100%}
:::

### 6-Month Change
::: {.chart-full}
![](output/ur_asian_m6.png){width=100%}
:::
::: {.chart-nopandemic}
![](output/ur_asian_m6_nopandemic.png){width=100%}
:::

### 12-Month Change
::: {.chart-full}
![](output/ur_asian_m12.png){width=100%}
:::
::: {.chart-nopandemic}
![](output/ur_asian_m12_nopandemic.png){width=100%}
:::
:::

## Unemployment Rate, Teenagers

::: {.panel-tabset}
### 1-Month Change
::: {.chart-full}
![](output/ur_teens_m1.png){width=100%}
:::
::: {.chart-nopandemic}
![](output/ur_teens_m1_nopandemic.png){width=100%}
:::

### 3-Month Change
::: {.chart-full}
![](output/ur_teens_m3.png){width=100%}
:::
::: {.chart-nopandemic}
![](output/ur_teens_m3_nopandemic.png){width=100%}
:::

### 6-Month Change
::: {.chart-full}
![](output/ur_teens_m6.png){width=100%}
:::
::: {.chart-nopandemic}
![](output/ur_teens_m6_nopandemic.png){width=100%}
:::

### 12-Month Change
::: {.chart-full}
![](output/ur_teens_m12.png){width=100%}
:::
::: {.chart-nopandemic}
![](output/ur_teens_m12_nopandemic.png){width=100%}
:::
:::

## Long-Term Unemployment (27+ Weeks)

::: {.panel-tabset}
### 1-Month Change
::: {.chart-full}
![](output/dou_27weeks_m1.png){width=100%}
:::
::: {.chart-nopandemic}
![](output/dou_27weeks_m1_nopandemic.png){width=100%}
:::

### 3-Month Change
::: {.chart-full}
![](output/dou_27weeks_m3.png){width=100%}
:::
::: {.chart-nopandemic}
![](output/dou_27weeks_m3_nopandemic.png){width=100%}
:::

### 6-Month Change
::: {.chart-full}
![](output/dou_27weeks_m6.png){width=100%}
:::
::: {.chart-nopandemic}
![](output/dou_27weeks_m6_nopandemic.png){width=100%}
:::

### 12-Month Change
::: {.chart-full}
![](output/dou_27weeks_m12.png){width=100%}
:::
::: {.chart-nopandemic}
![](output/dou_27weeks_m12_nopandemic.png){width=100%}
:::
:::
